subject: SEO Update — ARLO — 2026-07-09
html:
Week 3: AgencyAnalytics comparison page

Shipped the next comparison-hub page on the existing /compare template — no new template work needed, just content.

PageWhat ChangedTarget KeywordCheck It
/compare/agencyanalytics-vs-arloNew comparison page — positioned against AgencyAnalytics' actual product (white-label dashboards), not a generic template swap. FAQPage schema.agencyanalytics alternative (KD 7, 480/mo, $9.54 CPC)askarlo.app/compare/agencyanalytics-vs-arlo
llms.txtAdded all 3 connector pages + all 3 compare pages to the Pages list (previously missing despite being live)AI citation coverageaskarlo.app/llms.txt

Note: this session's checkout raced an earlier run and briefly duplicated the connector-matrix work already shipped on 2026-07-04/06 — caught it before pushing anything, no duplicate content went live. Worth a look if scheduling produces overlapping runs again.

Next: Whatagraph comparison page (same low-KD profile), then the still-deferred static-rendering pass on the marketing pages (auth provider currently forces no-store caching sitewide).
